Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the DECLARE model is quite technical but the request is about making it understandable and practical

Text: I should break it down into stages map each constraint to a real world rationale and emphasize the why behind each rule
